451.name: Chantry
451.description: The scent of rosemary hangs languidly in the air here within a small chantry. A large, carved wooden idol rests upon the far wall, slowly gathering dust.

3125.name: Under the Arch
3125.description: You stand underneath the small arch, before a gate of tarnished silver. A modest plaque adorns the gate at its center. Beyond the gate awaits a squat, ornately designed structure made up of flat pastel stonework. Trees rise hundreds of feet into the air, creating a thick canopy above.

3126.name: Before a Stone House
3126.description: Amidst the trees here is a tiny clearing in which resides this house. Layers of thin, flat stones in a variety of geometric shapes and sizes are affixed to the basic structure, and a solid oak door stands to the north.

npcs.name: Guardian of midor
npcs.description: You see through the illusion and can now face the reptilian beast for what it truly is.

518.name: Under the Steps
518.description: The word "pigsty" comes to mind as you survey this dingy, repulsive little hidey-hole beneath the steps. A pantheon of detritus parades within the confined space, a tribute to the artistry of neglected housekeeping... and yes, it does appear to be something's home.

npcs.name: Vicious goblin
npcs.description: of parasites call it their travelling home.  Everybody gotta have somebody,
